zh.Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯吉利姆爾
zh.Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Mackenzie於大約1539年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，她的父親Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail28歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail28歲。她於大約1550年與Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯吉利姆爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯吉利姆爾
zh-hans.Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Mackenzie于大约1539年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，她的父亲Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail28岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail28岁。她于大约1550年与Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1578年在英国苏格兰安格斯吉利姆爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Mackenzie was born about 1539, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, was 28. She married Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry about 1550. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1578, in Kirriemuir, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Mackenzie est née environ 1539, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry environ 1550. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1578, à Kirriemuir, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Mackenzie um 1539 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail 28. Sie hat um 1550 Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1578 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Kirriemuir, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Mackenzie è nata il circa 1539 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry circa 1550. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1578, nel Kirriemuir, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Mackenzieが約1539年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintailは28歳，母Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintailは28歳であった。約1550年にAngus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1578年にイギリススコットランドアンガスキリームイルで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Mackenzie(이)가 대략 1539년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 커리무이르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Mackenzie nasceu aproximadamente 1539, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1550. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1578, em Kirriemuir, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Mackenzie родилась около 1539 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry около 1550 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1578 г. в местности кирриемуир, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory Mackenzie nació aproximadamente 1539, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1550. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1578, en Kirriemuir, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
